prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day prediction on AMZN, I used a random walk model with historical volatility. AMZN typically has daily volatility around 2-3%. Over 3 days, this translates to approximately 3.5-5% total volatility. The point estimate remains at current price assuming no drift. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels, reflecting increased uncertainty over the 3-day horizon.
